allow: Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "nmcli connection show | grep -i hotspot; ls /etc/NetworkManager/dispatcher.d/ 2>/dev/null; iw list 2>/dev/null | grep -A2 ''valid interface''")
Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "iw phy phy0 info 2>/dev/null | grep -A5 ''Supported interface modes''")
Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "iw list 2>/dev/null | grep -A8 ''Supported interface modes'' || echo ''iw not found''; nmcli device wifi show-password 2>/dev/null; nmcli -t -f WIFI-HW,WIFI general")

Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "nmcli device wifi hotspot con-name RPi-Hub ssid RPi-Hub password rpihub1234 ifname wlan0 2>&1; nmcli connection show RPi-Hub 2>/dev/null | grep -E ''mode|method|band''")
Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "sudo nmcli device wifi hotspot con-name RPi-Hub ssid RPi-Hub password rpihub1234 ifname wlan0 2>&1")
Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "nmcli connection show | grep -i hotspot; nmcli connection show | grep RPi-Hub; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active")
Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "sudo nmcli connection delete RPi-Hub")

Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "sudo nmcli connection add type wifi con-name RPi-Hub ifname wlan0 ssid RPi-Hub mode ap wifi.band bg ipv4.method shared wifi-sec.key-mgmt wpa-psk wifi-sec.psk rpihub1234 autoconnect no")

Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "sudo chmod +x /home/obrelix/rpi-hub/scripts/wifi-hotspot.sh && sudo cp /home/obrelix/rpi-hub/scripts/wifi-hotspot.service /etc/systemd/system/wifi-hotspot.service && sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl restart rpi-hub")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o BatchMode=yes obrelix@192.168.1.201 "hostname && uname -a && uptime")

Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "systemctl is-active rpi-hub rpi-radio voidex maze-battlegrounds rpi-signboard 2>&1; echo '---'; ls /home/obrelix/ 2>&1; echo '---'; ls /home/obrelix/rpi-rgb-led-matrix/bindings/python 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo '---'; ls /home/obrelix/rpi-hub/services.json 2>&1")
Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "mkdir -p /home/obrelix/rpi-signboard && cd /home/obrelix/rpi-signboard && tar xzf - && ls -la")
Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "cd /home/obrelix/rpi-signboard && find . -type f | grep -v assets | sort && echo '---'; ls assets/fonts/")

Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "cd /home/obrelix/rpi-hub && tar xzf - && echo '---' && md5sum services.json sockets/signboard.js sockets/index.js public/js/signboard-widget.js views/dashboard.ejs public/css/style.css")
Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "sudo systemctl restart rpi-hub && sleep 2 && systemctl is-active rpi-hub && echo '---logs---' && sudo journalctl -u rpi-hub -n 20 --no-pager")
Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "sleep 2 && systemctl is-active rpi-hub && curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP %{http_code}\\n' http://localhost:3000/ && sudo journalctl -u rpi-hub -n 10 --no-pager")

Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "curl -s http://localhost:3000/ | grep -c 'signboard-widget' && echo '---' && systemctl is-enabled rpi-signboard && systemctl is-active rpi-signboard && echo '---' && systemctl cat rpi-signboard.service | head -20")

Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "systemctl cat rpi-signboard.service; echo '---'; cd /home/obrelix/rpi-signboard && python3 -c 'import main; from constants import DEFAULT_LED_COLS; from config import Config; from message_state import MessageState; from ipc.socket_handler import SocketHandler; print\(\\"import OK, LED_COLS=\\", DEFAULT_LED_COLS\)'")

Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "ls -ld /home/obrelix /home/obrelix/rpi-signboard /home/obrelix/rpi-signboard/assets /home/obrelix/rpi-signboard/assets/fonts /home/obrelix/rpi-signboard/assets/fonts/DejaVuSans.ttf; echo '---'; sudo -u daemon stat /home/obrelix/rpi-signboard/assets/fonts/DejaVuSans.ttf 2>&1")
Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "sudo systemctl stop rpi-signboard && systemctl is-active rpi-signboard 2>&1 || true")

Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "sudo systemctl reset-failed rpi-signboard; sudo systemctl start rpi-signboard && sleep 3 && systemctl is-active rpi-signboard && echo '---logs---' && sudo journalctl -u rpi-signboard -n 20 --no-pager")

Bash(ssh obrelix@192.168.1.201 "systemctl is-active rpi-signboard; echo '---recent logs---'; sudo journalctl -u rpi-signboard --since '30 seconds ago' --no-pager; echo '---hub logs---'; sudo journalctl -u rpi-hub --since '30 seconds ago' --no-pager | tail -10")
